description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular cabinet with a dark, weathered wood appearance, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or public parks. The front features two paneled doors with round knobs on the upper section, and four drawers with matching knobs on the lower section, providing ample storage space. The cabinet has a pronounced top ledge and a slightly flared base, giving it a sturdy and classic silhouette. The sides and back are plain, with the same textured, dark brown finish throughout. The surface appears hard and slightly rough, suggesting durability and resistance to wear. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the cabinet is designed to be accessed from the front.
description: A dark, weathered wooden cabinet with two doors and four drawers, featuring round knobs and a sturdy, classic design. The surface is hard and slightly rough, with a pronounced top ledge and flared base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, textured surface and the cabinet's flared base and top ledge.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back panel with the same dark finish as the rest of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the plain, textured surface and structural details of the first side.
description_view_3: Front view revealing two paneled doors with round knobs and four drawers below, each with matching knobs.
